title: Ecliptic Seasons: Fabricated
description: A native, lightweight rewrite of Ecliptic Seasons for Fabric, delivering a high-performance seasonal environments.
body:
![Icon](https://i.imgur.com/qPcYhb1.png)

# Ecliptic Seasons: Fabricated

[![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Our%20Community-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/invite/RCxe9qt4ka)

**Ecliptic Seasons: Fabricated** is a complete Fabric rewrite of the *[Ecliptic Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecliptic-seasons/versions)* (Solar Terms) mod, built independently from the (Neo)Forge version.  
It targets **Minecraft Java Edition 26.1+** and follows Fabric’s lightweight philosophy.

![Show](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WXA03JUt/images/07141f3ed3a5cc0b24d9bf0857364805664aba6e.jpeg)
---

## Development Status

| Minecraft Version | Status |
|------------------|---------|
| 26.2 | In Development |
| 26.1 | Continued Support |

## Removed features (compared to the original)
- Some chunk data storage like SnowInworld and WeatherRecords   
- Decorative / non‑essential items  
- Seasonal greenhouse core mechanics  
- Humidity wetter structure block

---

## Core seasonal features (retained)
- Winter atmosphere (snow accumulation, visual effects)  
- Day/night length changes based on season  
- Seasonal ambient sounds  
- Crop growth restrictions influenced by the current season and humidity

---

## 📦 Required dependencies

| Mod | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| **[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)** | Configuration file handling |
| **[Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api) (built‑in)** | Chunk biome data storage |

---

## 🚀 Recommended & optional support

### Rendering (strongly recommended)
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** – best performance as the rendering engine  

### Optional mod support (enable manually in config)
- **[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)** – advanced voxel rendering (requires manual enabling)  
- **[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)** – works with LOD rendering for distant terrain  

---

## 🌾 Arts credits

**Primary art:** YunFei  
**Most remaining work:** Aerolite_Dust  

---

## ℹ️ Notes
- **Fabric only** – does **not** work on Forge or NeoForge.  
- Designed to be lightweight: some advanced features of the original are omitted, but the core seasonal immersion remains fully intact.  
- No backports – stick to 26.1+.

---
